name: Olivia Troye
role: Homeland Security Advisor to Vice President Pence
summary: Former homeland security advisor to Vice President Pence who resigned in 2020 and endorsed Joe Biden, criticizing Trump's COVID-19 response.

keyStatements.quote: He is more concerned about himself and his reelection than he is about people dying.
That became clear to me when we were talking about the coronavirus response.

timeline.event: Served on White House Coronavirus Task Force

timeline.significance: Left over Trump's handling of pandemic

credibility.background: Former homeland security and counterterrorism advisor, national security professional with experience in DHS and DOD
positions: Homeland Security Advisor to Vice President Pence (2018-2020)
White House Coronavirus Task Force member (2020)

oppositionReasons: Said Trump prioritized reelection over Americans' lives during COVID-19
Cited concerns about the coronavirus response

sources.title: Ex-Pence aide Olivia Troye endorses Biden
